description: OpenObserve is an open source observability platform for logs, metrics, traces, and real user monitoring. It can be deployed self-hosted or used as a managed cloud service, and uses SQL and PromQL over telemetry data.
summary: OpenObserve exposes a tenant-specific HTTP API and an MCP server for AI clients; both require authentication, with documented Basic auth and additional service-account/token-based API access mentioned for programmatic use.
